content: We can reframe intrinsic curiosity bonuses in ICM/RND as a form of active memory pruning for SOTA active learning agents: only curious exploration of unexpected state transitions triggers writing novel observations to long-term episodic memory, automatically filtering out redundant, predictable experience that wastes limited memory capacity. This creates a naturally self-regulating memory pipeline that outperforms fixed-capacity or manually thresholded memory curation methods for 2024-2025 open-ended active learning agents.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
